name: Love2D Rules
description: Validation rules for Love2D game development

forbidden.message: Avoid global variables in Love2D - use local or require
forbidden.suggestion: Use 'local' prefix or require() for module imports

forbidden.message: Direct global table access is dangerous
forbidden.suggestion: Use proper module system or local variables

forbidden.message: loadstring can execute arbitrary code - security risk
forbidden.suggestion: Avoid dynamic code execution

forbidden.message: love.load should only be defined once in main.lua
Loading images in love.update or love.draw is slow
forbidden.suggestion: Load images in love.load() and reuse

forbidden.message: Loading fonts every frame is slow - load once
forbidden.suggestion: Load fonts in love.load() and store reference

forbidden.message: love.filesystem.load can execute arbitrary code
forbidden.suggestion: Use love.filesystem.read for data files

forbidden.message: Explicit garbage collection can cause frame drops
forbidden.suggestion: Let Lua manage garbage collection automatically

forbidden.message: os.execute is blocked in some Love2D distributions
forbidden.suggestion: Use love.system.openURL for URLs

forbidden.message: os.getenv access - validate environment variables
forbidden.suggestion: Check return value is not nil

forbidden.message: io.popen executes shell commands - security risk
forbidden.suggestion: Avoid shell command execution

forbidden.message: io.open - validate file path
forbidden.suggestion: Validate path doesn't contain ../ or user input

forbidden.message: io.tmpfile creates temp file - ensure secure handling
forbidden.suggestion: Use love.filesystem for Love2D compatibility

forbidden.message: debug.sethook affects performance significantly
forbidden.suggestion: Remove debug hooks in production

forbidden.message: Accessing debug registry is dangerous
forbidden.suggestion: Avoid debug module in production code

forbidden.message: string.dump creates bytecode - potential security issue
forbidden.suggestion: Avoid bytecode manipulation

forbidden.message: setfenv deprecated in Lua 5.2+
forbidden.suggestion: Use _ENV variable in Lua 5.2+

forbidden.message: getfenv deprecated in Lua 5.2+
forbidden.suggestion: Use _ENV variable in Lua 5.2+

forbidden.message: tonumber may return nil - check return value
forbidden.suggestion: Use assert(tonumber(x)) or check for nil

forbidden.message: tostring on nil returns 'nil' string
forbidden.suggestion: Check for nil before tostring

forbidden.message: pairs iterates in undefined order
forbidden.suggestion: Use ipairs for arrays or sorted iteration for deterministic behavior

forbidden.message: next used for table iteration
forbidden.suggestion: Use pairs() for clearer iteration

forbidden.message: rawset bypasses __newindex metamethod
forbidden.suggestion: Use normal table assignment unless necessary

forbidden.message: rawget bypasses __index metamethod
forbidden.suggestion: Use normal table access unless necessary

structure.message: Lua file exceeds 300 lines - split into modules
